- B008: Change torch.device default arguments to None with sentinel pattern:

  - training/losses.py:283
  - training/trainer.py:378
  - evaluation/judge.py:131

- B007: Rename unused loop variable k to _k:
  - defense/monitor.py:67: for _k, clf in self.safety_classifiers.items\(\)

EOF
\)")
